identity.mission: Create a 'Tactical Artisan' interface that blends Swiss precision with the raw materiality of construction.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine 'Architectural Blueprint' precision with 'Painter's Studio' vibrancy.
Content is King: Data clarity is paramount for quotes, but the frame should feel premium.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to separate complex quote data.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in bright construction sites.

structure.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 bg-background border-r z-50

card.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

input.style: h-10 rounded-md border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

hero_login.usage: Login page background or hero section

dashboard_card_bg.usage: Inventory section header or empty state

quote_header.usage: Quote PDF header or success state

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Implement the 'Tactical Artisan' color palette in tailwind.config.js immediately. Add the custom colors (primary: #005f73, etc).
2. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Customize the existing Shadcn components in /src/components/ui. Remove default 'zinc' feel. Increase border radius to '0.5rem' or '0.75rem'.
3. LAYOUT: Build a SidebarLayout component that wraps the main content. Do NOT use a top navbar for the main app navigation.
4. DASHBOARD: Create a 'Bento Grid' dashboard using the spacing rules. Use the 'dashboard_card_bg' image as a subtle texture or header for the inventory widget.
5. QUOTE BUILDER: This is the core feature. Use a dense table layout but with 'comfortable' padding (py-3). Use 'secondary' color for the header row.
6. PDF: Ensure the PDF generation uses the same 'Swiss' typography guidelines for a professional look.
7. FILE EXTENSIONS: STRICTLY use .js / .jsx extensions. Do not create .ts / .tsx files.
8. LANGUAGE: All hardcoded text MUST be in ITALIAN.
9. ICONS: Use Lucide-React (already installed). Use 'PaintBucket', 'Roller', 'Palette' icons for painting context.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
